Based on ‘True Events’

This is ‘The Story So Far’, a stand-up comedy set about the most chaotic day of my life.
The day I landed on the news for a joke
and also landed in a hospital for a heart procedure. 
This set is about anxiety, parents, panic, bad timing, and laughing when your heart (literally) won’t cooperate.

I hope you guys live the story as I lived it, It’s the closest I’ve come to telling a story exactly as it happened.

youtube_videos.description:
An unexpected blast of heavy snow blanketed parts of Calgary on Wednesday, catching many locals by surprise.
 
The snow came fast and furious during the height of the morning rush hour, with many areas in the north part of the city reporting whiteout conditions.

Paul Reed finished with a team-high 21 points along with 10 rebounds for the Pistons in the losing effort. The Thunder improve their record to 60-16 with the win, while the Pistons fall to 54-21 for the season.

Tyler Burton finished with a team-high 17 points along with 4 rebounds for the Grizzlies in the losing effort. The Suns improve their record to 42-33 with the win, while the Grizzlies fall to 25-50 for the season.

Eight years ago, MongoDB was an internal project at 10gen, a company that was trying to build a platform-as-a-service out of open-source components. The team at 10gen realized that the platform-as-a-service play would be too complex, and difficult to build. Since MongoDB was the most valuable component of that project, they narrowed their focus to this new document-oriented database.

youtube_videos.tags: The Use and History of Go in MongoDB (MongoDB World 2022), MongoDB started as a C++ database. However, as it moved into the public cloud and particularly into offering software as a service (SaaS), the requirements changed. This panel will introduce how Go be
youtube_videos.description:
MongoDB started as a C++ database. However, as it moved into the public cloud and particularly into offering software as a service (SaaS), the requirements changed. This panel will introduce how Go became a major technology used in MongoDB and how it helped the company’s migration to the cloud. Our panel will explore what prompted investigating Go as a technology, why it was initially chosen, what pitfalls and problems were encountered, and what we've learned.

GTnzw-wKlFY.description:
MongoDB started as a C++ database. However, as it moved into the public cloud and particularly into offering software as a service (SaaS), the requirements changed. This panel will introduce how Go became a major technology used in MongoDB and how it helped the company’s migration to the cloud. Our panel will explore what prompted investigating Go as a technology, why it was initially chosen, what pitfalls and problems were encountered, and what we've learned.
